title: ChatQuiz
description: ChatQuiz brings fun global math quizzes to your server, rewarding players with Vault currency for correct answers and making chat more engaging
body:
# ChatQuiz
> ChatQuiz transforms the way players interact on your Minecraft server by giving them fun and engaging global chat quizzes that make chatting more interactive and rewarding. The plugin introduces simple math questions focused on addition and subtraction, presenting them to all online players at configurable intervals. Players who answer correctly are rewarded with Vault-based currency, giving them a tangible incentive to participate. Winners receive their reward privately while the correct answer announcement is broadcasted to everyone, keeping the experience fair and exciting. Questions, rewards, quiz intervals, and timeout settings are fully configurable in config.yml, making the plugin flexible and easy to manage. Server owners are automatically notified in-game whenever a new version of the plugin is available, keeping them up to date with the latest improvements and fixes. This ensures that ChatQuiz remains compatible, enjoyable, and fun over time. ChatQuiz is a simple yet effective way to make chatting, math challenges, and player interaction on your server more engaging and rewarding.


```
                            Thank you for using ChatQuiz! We appreciate your support 😄
```
